text: Handling deadlines effectively requires good time management and clear prioritization. Start by breaking your tasks into smaller steps and ranking them by urgency and importance. This helps you focus on what truly matters first. Scope management is also crucial—avoid adding extra work that wasn’t planned. If you realize a deadline is becoming unrealistic, communicate early with your team or supervisor. Explain your situation honestly and suggest a revised timeline or ask for support. Clear communication prevents misunderstandings and shows you are proactive. With these strategies, you can meet deadlines with less stress and better results.
